steps.title: Express buildings as a percentage of the total plot
steps.content:
The plot is 52.0% farmland and 48.0% pasture (100% − 52.0% = 48.0%). To find buildings as a percentage of the entire plot, multiply the building percentage by the land type percentage:

Buildings on farmland = 28.5% of 52.0% = 0.285 × 0.52 = 0.1482 = 14.82% of plot
Buildings on pasture = 11.0% of 48.0% = 0.11 × 0.48 = 0.0528 = 5.28% of plot

steps.title: Sum to find p
steps.content: The buildings on the entire plot are: $$p = 14.82\% + 5.28\% = 20.1\%$$
